Let agents read and act on Gmail and Goo: Let agents read and act on Gmail and Google Calendar for each user. Everyone connects with their own Google sign-in, so messages and events stay scoped to that person — no shared keys.

Lets the agent ask you back (with button: Lets the agent ask you back (with buttons or free text) when a critical piece of info is missing or the request is ambiguous
Link sync started in background. You wil: Link sync started in background. You will be notified when it completes.
LLM analyzes attached DbSphere columns a: LLM analyzes attached DbSphere columns and proposes business terms. Accept to add them to a glossary and create the mapping automatically.
LLM analyzes this link's glossary and kn: LLM analyzes this link's glossary and knowledge bases, then replaces the catalog with its proposals (manual entries are preserved).
Log would-rotate decisions without touch: Log would-rotate decisions without touching live config
Look up a business term and return its d: Look up a business term and return its database column mappings with WHERE filters.
Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only (2-50 chars)
Main logo displayed in sidebar and chat: Main logo displayed in sidebar and chat (PNG)
Manually map business terms to database: Manually map business terms to database columns/tables. These mappings survive re-sync and power LLM tools (coming in next slice).
Map a business term/concept to a databas: Map a business term/concept to a database table or column.
Map each glossary to the knowledge bases: Map each glossary to the knowledge bases whose documents should be matched to its terms during sync.
Maps model names to Azure deployment nam: Maps model names to Azure deployment names. Leave empty if deployment name equals model name.
Match glossary synonyms in text matching: Match glossary synonyms in text matching
Maximum messages reached for this sessio: Maximum messages reached for this session.
Meet link is generated asynchronously an: Meet link is generated asynchronously and may not appear immediately.
Migrate envelopes to the new KEK?: Migrate envelopes to the new KEK?
Minimum 1. The scheduler checks at most: Minimum 1. The scheduler checks at most once per interval; 24 = daily.
Model name already exists, please choose: Model name already exists, please choose a different one
Model used only for edge type suggestion: Model used only for edge type suggestions. Entity sync uses a separate model.
Module and expiry date are required: Module and expiry date are required
Module ID and Display Name are required: Module ID and Display Name are required
Name: Name
Name and ID are required, please fill th: Name and ID are required, please fill them out
No audit rows match the current filter: No audit rows match the current filter
No blank tools to classify. Check tools: No blank tools to classify. Check tools whose read/write is unset.
No columns found. Run schema extraction: No columns found. Run schema extraction on this DbSphere first.
No configuration fields defined for this: No configuration fields defined for this database type.
No edge types yet. Add one or get LLM re: No edge types yet. Add one or get LLM recommendations.
No eligible filters. Add non-glossary fi: No eligible filters. Add non-glossary filters (string / enum / collection / number / date) to the linked KBs.
No embed widgets yet. Create one to get: No embed widgets yet. Create one to get started.
No guardrails configured. Create guardra: No guardrails configured. Create guardrails in Workspace > Guardrails first.
No image connections configured. Click +: No image connections configured. Click + to add one.
No knowledge bases have a glossary filte: No knowledge bases have a glossary filter for this glossary. Configure a glossary filter on a KB first.
No knowledge links yet. Add one to bundl: No knowledge links yet. Add one to bundle a glossary with knowledge bases.
No knowledge links yet. Add one to conne: No knowledge links yet. Add one to connect database entities with documents.
No knowledge links yet. Add one to match: No knowledge links yet. Add one to match a glossary with knowledge bases.
No mappings yet. Click \"Add mapping\" t: No mappings yet. Click "Add mapping" to create one.
No model selected. All models will be av: No model selected. All models will be available.
No nodes yet. Attach a glossary and clic: No nodes yet. Attach a glossary and click "Sync now".
No notification channels configured. Ask: No notification channels configured. Ask your administrator to set up email or webhook channels.
No overrides set for this model.
No panels yet. Click \"Add Panel\" to ge: No panels yet. Click "Add Panel" to get started.
No pending candidates. Click \"Extract f: No pending candidates. Click "Extract from DbSphere" to generate suggestions.
No pending chunks — only glossary/DB nod: No pending chunks — only glossary/DB nodes will be refreshed.
No permission to create new tags. Pick a: No permission to create new tags. Pick an existing tag or contact admin.
No permission — admin consent or re-logi: No permission — admin consent or re-login required.
No providers configured. Click + to add: No providers configured. Click + to add one.
No result generated. Please try again.
No rows match the active filters.
No schema found. Run schema extraction o: No schema found. Run schema extraction on this DbSphere first, or enter manually.
No selected files have extracted metadat: No selected files have extracted metadata
No tables yet. Test the connection and e: No tables yet. Test the connection and extract schema to begin.
No usage recorded for this period.
No worker key configured. Generate a key: No worker key configured. Generate a key for worker authentication.
None of these files match — please searc: None of these files match — please search again
Not available — scope not requested (nee: Not available — scope not requested (needs setup + app registration).
Not connected — sign in again to enable.
Note: deleting an entry from the catalog: Note: deleting an entry from the catalog does not delete existing edges that use it. Existing edges remain in the graph.
Off by default. Turn on after running a: Off by default. Turn on after running a Dry-run check.
Off: agent can only run SELECT (read-onl: Off: agent can only run SELECT (read-only). On: agent can also run INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DDL, but each call requires user approval.
Offload heavy tasks (file processing, sc: Offload heavy tasks (file processing, schema extraction) to external workers via Redis queue
On: authenticate via the GCP runtime (wo: On: authenticate via the GCP runtime (workload identity / GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS / gcloud ADC) instead of a Service Account key. Project ID is still required.
One-line description shown in the Teams: One-line description shown in the Teams app list. Max 80 characters.
Only allow uploading files with these ex: Only allow uploading files with these extensions. Leave empty to allow all file types.
Only glossaries attached to this KG and: Only glossaries attached to this KG and not yet linked are shown.
Only groups you are a member of are show: Only groups you are a member of are shown. Empty = private (owner only).
Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyp: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed
Only users and groups with permission ca: Only users and groups with permission can access
Open graph in a new window (fullscreen): Open graph in a new window (fullscreen)
Open or create a SQL file to start.
Open WebUI can use tools provided by any: ClooSphere can use tools provided by any OpenAPI server.
Open WebUI uses SpeechT5 and CMU Arctic: ClooSphere uses SpeechT5 and CMU Arctic speaker embeddings.
Open WebUI version (v{{OPEN_WEBUI_VERSIO: ClooSphere version (v{{OPEN_WEBUI_VERSION}}) is lower than required version (v{{REQUIRED_VERSION}})
Optional system prompt for the chat: Optional system prompt for the chat
Optional. Sensitive values are encrypted: Optional. Sensitive values are encrypted with the built-in key (fernet) by default; configure a KMS provider for external key management.
Optional. Standard documents are process: Optional. Standard documents are processed by the built-in extractor; configure an engine only for advanced OCR/Office extraction.
OTLP endpoint for the OpenTelemetry Coll: OTLP endpoint for the OpenTelemetry Collector. Use port 4318 (HTTP, recommended) or 4317 (gRPC). Cloud environments like Azure App Service require HTTP (4318).
OTLP gRPC endpoint for the OpenTelemetry: OTLP gRPC endpoint for the OpenTelemetry Collector. All app instances should point to the same collector.
Output guardrail disables real-time stre: Output guardrail disables real-time streaming. Responses will be sent after security check is complete.
Paste license or feature key here...
Paste the OpenAPI JSON, or upload a .jso: Paste the OpenAPI JSON, or upload a .json file. Used when the spec URL requires login.
Paste this URL into Azure Bot Configurat: Paste this URL into Azure Bot Configuration → Messaging endpoint.
Periodically clean up zombie consumers a: Periodically clean up zombie consumers and stuck messages without manual action. Active workers and in-progress jobs are never affected.
Permanently delete selected files (remov: Permanently delete selected files (removes chunks and extracted metadata)
Permanently delete this customer and all: Permanently delete this customer and all their key records?
Permanently delete this organization and: Permanently delete this organization and all its organizational units. This action cannot be undone.
Pick the glossaries and databases this k: Pick the glossaries and databases this knowledge graph should include. After saving, click "Sync now".
Please add at least one task: Please add at least one task
Please fill in all required fields.
Please fill in target database fields.
Please paste or upload an OpenAPI spec.
Please provide a reason for exporting au: Please provide a reason for exporting audit data
Please select a default model in Setting: Please select a default model in Settings before uploading data files.
Please select a model for this link or s: Please select a model for this link or set the KG default.
Please select an AI model first.
Please select an LLM model first.
Please select at least one database: Please select at least one database
Please select at least one knowledge bas: Please select at least one knowledge base.
Please select both source and target nod: Please select both source and target nodes.
Popup blocked. Please allow popups for t: Popup blocked. Please allow popups for this site.
Popup: small panel above bubble. Side: f: Popup: small panel above bubble. Side: full-height side panel that hides the bubble.
Pre-filled by LLM auto-generate. You can: Pre-filled by LLM auto-generate. You can change or clear it.
Preview the payload that will be saved f: Preview the payload that will be saved for this agent.
Previous attempt failed; please start a: Previous attempt failed; please start a new draft.
Publisher name on the Teams app detail p: Publisher name on the Teams app detail page.
Question: Question
Re-encrypt every legacy ciphertext (Conf: Re-encrypt every legacy ciphertext (Config secrets, DbSphere connections, tool connection keys, license tokens) under the currently configured provider. Idempotent — re-running is safe.
Re-extract all selected files, replacing: Re-extract all selected files, replacing existing metadata (including manual edits).
Re-running extraction resets the loaded: Re-running extraction resets the loaded few-shot examples, documents, and other memory if the schema has changed. Continue?
Read = view & assign existing tags. Writ: Read = view & assign existing tags. Write = also create/edit/delete tags.
Read by the agent at search time to deci: Read by the agent at search time to decide if this filter applies to the user's question.
Read by the AI at indexing time when ext: Read by the AI at indexing time when extracting this filter's value from each document.
Read-only mode is on — click to allow wr: Read-only mode is on — click to allow writes
Read-only mode is on — disable to run wr: Read-only mode is on — disable to run write queries.
Reads attached KB documents with an LLM: Reads attached KB documents with an LLM and extracts entities + relationships. The extractor reuses existing glossary/DB nodes (entity linking) for connected multi-hop reasoning, so attach and sync glossaries/databases first. Slow and incurs LLM cost.
Rebuild search index for '{{name}}'? Thi: Rebuild search index for '{{name}}'? This will re-push all terms to the search engine.
Reclaim & Delete: force-ack {{n}} pendin: Reclaim & Delete: force-ack {{n}} pending message(s), drop them, then delete this consumer. The work will NOT run.
Recommended: use a dedicated DB user wit: Recommended: use a dedicated DB user with minimum privileges.
Red = no permission for this category (h: Red = no permission for this category (hover for details).
Redirecting you to Open WebUI Community: Redirecting you to Open WebUI Community
Redis is not connected. Background tasks: Redis is not connected. Background tasks will be processed in the main server thread.
Redis is required for external workers. Set REDIS_URL environment variable to enable.
Register Entra / Google OAuth audiences: Register Entra / Google OAuth audiences whose ID tokens can be passed to Cloosphere API via Authorization: Bearer <id_token>. Unregistered audiences are rejected.
Registered feature modules and their min: Registered feature modules and their minimum tier requirements
Remove '{{name}}' from extracted tables?: Remove '{{name}}' from extracted tables? This will delete all related memory data.
Required when bot is enabled. Each user: Required when bot is enabled. Each user can still switch via /agent in Teams.
Requires helper script setup. Developers: Requires helper script setup. Developers must configure their coding tool to send repository metadata.
Reranker re-scores search results using: Reranker re-scores search results using a semantic model for improved accuracy. Optional.
Resources from attached knowledge graphs: Resources from attached knowledge graphs are auto-included for this agent (filtered by your access). They will not appear in the pickers below.
Restricted scope (calendar.events) requi: Restricted scope (calendar.events) requires CASA Tier 2 security audit.
Restricted scope (drive) requires CASA T: Restricted scope (drive) requires CASA Tier 2 security audit.
Restrict answers to the connected data s: Restrict answers to the connected data sources (knowledge bases, databases, tools).
Retry all failed files in this knowledge: Retry all failed files in this knowledge base
Revoke the current worker key? Connected: Revoke the current worker key? Connected workers will stop working.
Run a query to see results.
Run MCP server as a subprocess using std: Run MCP server as a subprocess using stdin/stdout
Run Test Connection first to enable the: Run Test Connection first to enable the SQL Editor.
Safely remove consumers that have been i: Safely remove consumers that have been idle > 1 hour AND have no pending messages. No data loss.
Same-row column values passed to the LLM: Same-row column values passed to the LLM as context. Not stored in entries.
Save and update apiKeyHelper in settings: Save and update apiKeyHelper in settings.json
Save the knowledge graph first to enable: Save the knowledge graph first to enable sync.
Scan extracted document text with a guar: Scan extracted document text with a guardrail. If a violation is detected (e.g. PII, sensitive data), the file upload will be blocked.
Scheduler periodically checks Azure Key: Scheduler periodically checks Azure Key Vault for a newer KEK version (created by KV rotation_policy) and re-encrypts every envelope under it. Use Dry-run for the first activation period to preview decisions in the audit log.
Schedules automatically run agents at sp: Schedules automatically run agents at specified times.
Schema extraction is already running ({{: Schema extraction is already running ({{elapsed}}s elapsed). Try again to force restart.
Schema extraction is already running. Do: Schema extraction is already running. Do you want to force restart?
Schema extraction started in the backgro: Schema extraction started in the background. Check progress at the top of the page.
Search anchors (abbreviations, full name: Search anchors (abbreviations, full names, other notations)
Search nodes by meaning (e.g. \"VIP cust: Search nodes by meaning (e.g. "VIP customer", "user table")
Select a database from the knowledge lin: Select a database from the knowledge links first.
Select a guardrail to apply to all chats: Select a guardrail to apply to all chats. PII detection, blocked words, and LLM Judge will be enforced globally.
Select a model to enable Q&A generation: Select a model to enable Q&A generation
Select a subject and enter a token amoun: Select a subject and enter a token amount
Select a term to view details: Select a term to view details
Select at least one tool to classify.
Select column to match with source key: Select column to match with source key
Select databases the agent will use.
Select files to delete, or configure fil: Select files to delete, or configure filters to extract metadata
Select glossaries the agent will use.
Select glossaries to include in this kno: Select glossaries to include in this knowledge graph. After saving, click "Sync now".
Select guardrails the agent will use.
Select guardrails to scan extracted docu: Select guardrails to scan extracted document text. If a violation is detected (e.g. PII, sensitive data), the file upload will be blocked.
Select KBs containing documents related: Select KBs containing documents related to this table (e.g. product manuals).
Select knowledge bases the agent will us: Select knowledge bases the agent will use.
Select knowledge bases whose documents w: Select knowledge bases whose documents will be matched to this glossary during sync. Leave empty to extract glossary + DB only.
Select knowledge graphs the agent will u: Select knowledge graphs the agent will use.
Select one or more knowledge bases whose: Select one or more knowledge bases whose documents will be matched to this glossary during sync.
Select one or more tables to extract: Select one or more tables to extract
Select the backend that encrypts sensiti: Select the backend that encrypts sensitive configuration values. Switching providers does not migrate existing data — legacy ciphertexts continue to decrypt via fallback.
Select tool connections (MCP/OpenAPI) to: Select tool connections (MCP/OpenAPI) to use with this model.
Select tool connections the agent will u: Select tool connections the agent will use.
Select which databases referenced by thi: Select which databases referenced by this glossary to include.
Select which KB filter values become nod: Select which KB filter values become nodes in this knowledge graph link. Glossary filters are already used as anchors and are not listed here.
Select which KB filter values become nodes in this link.
Select which knowledge bases to include: Select which knowledge bases to include in this link. Only KBs with a glossary filter for the selected glossary are shown.
Select which quality checks should run d: Select which quality checks should run during evaluation.
Select which upload contexts the guardra: Select which upload contexts the guardrails apply to. Unchecked contexts will skip all guardrail checks.
Selected tasks are published to a Redis: Selected tasks are published to a Redis Stream queue
Selected users will receive an independe: Selected users will receive an independent copy of this project.
Selected users will receive an independent copy of this schedule.
Self-managed Fernet using WEBUI_SECRET_K: Self-managed Fernet using WEBUI_SECRET_KEY. No external dependency.
Semantic search requires the search engi: Semantic search requires the search engine to be configured in Admin > Settings > Documents.
Send traces and metrics to Azure Applica: Send traces and metrics to Azure Application Insights via OTEL Collector.
Send traces, metrics, and error logs dir: Send traces, metrics, and error logs directly to Azure Application Insights. Auto-detected from Azure App Service environment variables.
Sensitive scope (gmail.send) requires Go: Sensitive scope (gmail.send) requires Google App verification.
Separate KEK for Restricted (PII, financ: Separate KEK for Restricted (PII, financial) classifications. Leave blank to share the default KEK above. Same Service Principal is reused.
Server capped the result. Add LIMIT to y: Server capped the result. Add LIMIT to your query for a smaller, faster fetch.
Set this key as WORKER_CALLBACK_API_KEY: Set this key as WORKER_CALLBACK_API_KEY in the worker environment.
Set to 0 for unlimited. Applied to all u: Set to 0 for unlimited. Applied to all users in this group.
Set to 0 for unlimited. Applied to all users without individual limits.
Set to 0 for unlimited. Empty = no limit: Set to 0 for unlimited. Empty = follow global setting.
Sets the contact admin shown on the acco: Sets the contact admin shown on the account activation pending screen
Show a form to collect name and email be: Show a form to collect name and email before starting the conversation.
Show the agent's tool calls (arguments /: Show the agent's tool calls (arguments / results) and thinking as collapsible blocks before the answer
Showing first {{count}} — refine filter: Showing first {{count}} — refine filter to see more
Shown in chat, user must enable: Shown in chat, user must enable
Shown in Teams app gallery and chat head: Shown in Teams app gallery and chat header. Max 30 characters.
Shown on the Teams app detail page as th: Shown on the Teams app detail page as the publisher.
Skip files that already have extracted m: Skip files that already have extracted metadata.
Some records failed to migrate. Check ba: Some records failed to migrate. Check backend logs for details.
Some records failed to rotate. Old ciphe: Some records failed to rotate. Old ciphertexts may still decrypt — re-run rotation to retry, or check backend logs.
Specific tenant GUID locks login to that: Specific tenant GUID locks login to that directory. Use 'common' for any Microsoft account.
Start your enterprise AI innovation with: Start your enterprise AI innovation with ClooSphere
Subject: Subject
Suggested starter prompts shown to users: Suggested starter prompts shown to users.
Switch the master key (KEK). The new KEK: Switch the master key (KEK). The new KEK is health-checked first, then every existing envelope is re-encrypted under it. Old ciphertexts remain decryptable as long as the prior KEK version still exists in the vault.
Sync entities from this link to the know: Sync entities from this link to the knowledge graph.
Sync Keycloak group hierarchy as organiz: Sync Keycloak group hierarchy as organizational units
Sync organization structure from Keycloa: Sync organization structure from Keycloak groups
Sync organization structure from Keycloak. Server URL and credentials are configured via OPENID_PROVIDER_URL, OAUTH_CLIENT_ID, and OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET environment variables.
Tags are shared across all workspace ite: Tags are shared across all workspace items (agents, knowledge, guardrails, etc.)
Tamper-evident hash-chained record of ev: Tamper-evident hash-chained record of every KMS wrap/unwrap/rotate/health-check operation. Tampering with any historic row breaks the chain on Verify.
Tasks are processed directly without que: Tasks are processed directly without queuing.
Team/Group chat scopes automatically add: Team/Group chat scopes automatically add required RSC permissions (admin consent at Teams Admin Center).
teams.bot.help_text:
Commands:
• /agent — pick an agent
• /current — show current agent
• /reset — clear the conversation
• /lang <code> — change language (e.g. en, ko)
• /help — show this help
teams.bot.lang_unsupported: ⚠️ Unsupported language code. Usage: /lang <code> (e.g. en, ko)
teams.bot.no_selected_agent: No agent selected. Run /agent to choose one.
teams.bot.select_agent_first: Please select an agent above to continue.
teams.bot.unexpected_error: ❌ An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs.
teams.bot.user_match_failed: ⚠️ Could not match your Cloosphere account. Please sign in with Microsoft first.
Template file is corrupt or not a valid: Template file is corrupt or not a valid Office document
Terms belonging to this category will be: Terms belonging to this category will be permanently removed.
Terms remain and are moved to \"Uncatego: Terms remain and are moved to "Uncategorized".
Test KG tools directly without creating: Test KG tools directly without creating an agent. Results show what the agent would see.
Text extraction, chunking, embedding, ve: Text extraction, chunking, embedding, vector DB storage
The generated key (sk-...) is used as th: The generated key (sk-...) is used as the API key in tool configurations below.
The glossary this filter pulls terms fro: The glossary this filter pulls terms from. Click × to disconnect.
The name displayed in the browser tab, s: The name displayed in the browser tab, sidebar, and throughout the interface.
The PPT uploaded in the “Upload PPT temp: The PPT uploaded in the “Upload PPT template” card below becomes the default design (auto-converted into a PPT Generator template). A PPT attached in a chat overrides it for that request.
The relationship label for edges between: The relationship label for edges between source and target values.
This connection cannot be deleted becaus: This connection cannot be deleted because its models are currently in use by agents.
This connection injects each user's own: This connection injects each user's own SSO access token into the Authorization header on every call. No key needed here — users connect by signing in with the matching provider.
This connection injects each user's own SSO access token into the Authorization header on every call. No key needed — users connect by signing in with the matching provider.
This database is connected to the follow: This database is connected to the following agents. Please remove it from the agents first.
This Flow ID is already in use: This Flow ID is already in use
This glossary has no category → database: This glossary has no category → database column mappings yet.
This glossary is connected to the follow: This glossary is connected to the following agents. Please remove it from the agents first.
This guardrail is connected to the follo: This guardrail is connected to the following agents. Please remove it from the agents first.
This KB has {{count}} files. Continue cl: This KB has {{count}} files. Continue cloning?
This knowledge base is connected to the: This knowledge base is connected to the following agents. Please remove it from the agents first.
This model is currently in use. Please r: This model is currently in use. Please remove it from the following first.
This switches the master key and re-encr: This switches the master key and re-encrypts every protected envelope under it (Config, DbSphere, tool connections, user API keys). The old KEK must remain present in the vault so historic ciphertexts decrypt during the rewrap.
This will make approximately {{calls}} L: This will make approximately {{calls}} LLM calls across {{kbs}} knowledge base(s) ({{chunks}} pending chunks). Continue?
This will re-encrypt every legacy sensit: This will re-encrypt every legacy sensitive value under the current KMS provider. The operation is idempotent and safe to re-run, but writes to multiple tables.
This will re-extract entities from the g: This will re-extract entities from the glossary, databases, and knowledge bases attached to this link. Existing entity nodes for this link may be updated.
This will replace {{count}} existing LLM: This will replace {{count}} existing LLM recommendation(s). Manual entries will be kept.
This will run a full sync of this knowle: This will run a full sync of this knowledge graph — every linked glossary, database, and knowledge base will be re-extracted. It may take a few minutes.
This will run a full sync of this knowledge graph — every linked glossary, database, and knowledge base will be re-extracted. It may take several minutes.
This will sync the glossary, databases,: This will sync the glossary, databases, and knowledge bases attached to this link.
Tip: Use a preset icon if you want to cu: Tip: Use a preset icon if you want to customize the icon color. Uploaded images keep their original colors.
Title: Title
To enable monitoring, set ENABLE_OTEL=tr: To enable monitoring, set ENABLE_OTEL=true and OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT in the app environment variables.
To pass user authentication, add data-to: To pass user authentication, add data-token attribute:
Toggle ON: KB extraction runs as part of: Toggle ON: KB extraction runs as part of every "Sync now". Toggle OFF: skipped during sync — but you can still trigger it manually with the button below.
Token name and key are required: Token name and key are required
Top K controls the number of search resu: Top K controls the number of search results retrieved from the vector database.
Top K controls the number of search results. Reranker Top K controls how many results remain after reranking.
Traverse N-hop neighborhood of a specifi: Traverse N-hop neighborhood of a specific node (requires node ID from search results).
Turn a chat conversation into a polished: Turn a chat conversation into a polished, editable PowerPoint deck. Upload your company template once and its colors, fonts, and layout are reused automatically — or attach a deck in a chat to match its design for that request.
Uh-oh! This command is already registere: Uh-oh! This command is already registered. Please choose another command string.
Uh-oh! This id is already registered. Pl: Uh-oh! This id is already registered. Please choose another id string.
Uh-oh! This model id is already register: Uh-oh! This model id is already registered. Please choose another model id string.
Uh-oh! This name is already registered. Please choose another name.
Unchecked tasks continue to run in-proce: Unchecked tasks continue to run in-process as before
Unique identifier used in API URL path. Lowercase, numbers, hyphens, underscores only.
Unset — set read/write or use AI classif: Unset — set read/write or use AI classify
Upload CSV/Excel files and analyze data: Upload CSV/Excel files and analyze data with Python code (Code Interpreter)
Upload XLSX, CSV, Markdown, or JSON. Col: Upload XLSX, CSV, Markdown, or JSON. Column mapping + optional AI rule.
Use a dedicated Service Principal when t: Use a dedicated Service Principal when the Key Vault lives in a different tenant from your Microsoft OAuth app. Leave empty to fall back to MICROSOFT_CLIENT_* or DefaultAzureCredential.
Use a service account client with realm-: Use a service account client with realm-management roles
Use a Vision LLM to detect inappropriate: Use a Vision LLM to detect inappropriate images during upload.
Use an LLM to classify document sensitiv: Use an LLM to classify document sensitivity. Categories can be configured with allow/flag/block actions.
Use Conservative mode to forbid AI-writt: Use Conservative mode to forbid AI-written wording inside description.
Use individual JSON fields from the agen: Use individual JSON fields from the agent response
Use Keycloak admin credentials directly: Use Keycloak admin credentials directly (deprecated in OAuth 2.1)
Use Keycloak Organizations feature (requ: Use Keycloak Organizations feature (requires Keycloak 26 or later)
Use LLM to find terms beyond text matchi: Use LLM to find terms beyond text matching
Use the LLM to also catch terms that tex: Use the LLM to also catch terms that text matching missed (e.g. abbreviations, multilingual). Adds cost & latency.
Used by entity sync: category definition: Used by entity sync: category definition, KB document matching, and KB chunk entity extraction. Save the KG after changing.
Used for AI extraction and AI descriptio: Used for AI extraction and AI description generation across all filters.
Used in maps_to edge — applied as SQL WH: Used in maps_to edge — applied as SQL WHERE
Used to derive privacy & terms URLs.
Users can override via /agent in Teams.
Users can switch to these agents by typi: Users can switch to these agents by typing / in the chat input.
Users must sign in with email/password o: Users must sign in with email/password or OAuth to use the widget.
Uses this model as auto-eval judge: Uses this model as auto-eval judge
Values with high cardinality (number/dat: Values with high cardinality (number/date) may create many nodes
Versioned KEK URI from your Key Vault. T: Versioned KEK URI from your Key Vault. The Service Principal must have the "Key Vault Crypto User" role on this vault.
View all guardrail logs in Monitoring: View all guardrail logs in Monitoring
Warn: Show warning but allow usage. Bloc: Warn: Show warning but allow usage. Block: Prevent further usage.
What data does this database contain?: What data does this database contain?
When enabled, features are restricted ba: When enabled, features are restricted based on the registered license. When disabled, all features are available.
When enabled, requests without repositor: When enabled, requests without repository metadata will be rejected. Developers must use the helper script.
When enabled, sync will use an LLM to re: When enabled, sync will use an LLM to read attached KB documents and extract doc_entity nodes + related_to edges. This enables multi-hop reasoning queries but is slow and incurs LLM cost (max 20 chunks per KB).
When installed at team/org level, which: When installed at team/org level, which surface is pinned by default.
When multiple limits exist (global, grou: When multiple limits exist (global, group, organization, user), the highest value is applied.
When on, extraction LLM may only use edg: When on, extraction LLM may only use edge types in this catalog. When off, the catalog is a loose vocabulary hint and new types may be added automatically during extraction.
When on, PPT is generated by the PPT Gen: When on, PPT is generated by the PPT Generator service instead of the built-in engine (python-pptx).
When ON, this KG's record of already-pro: When ON, this KG's record of already-processed chunks is wiped before extraction so the LLM revisits every chunk. Use after switching to a stronger model or fixing the prompt.
When code execution is off, the in-chat: When code execution is off, the in-chat code interpreter (running and visualizing code) is unavailable.
When image generation is not configured,: When image generation is not configured, the image generation feature is unavailable in chat.
When web search is off, the real-time we: When web search is off, the real-time web search tool is unavailable in chat.
Without a document processing profile, k: Without a document processing profile, knowledge base creation and file uploads are blocked.
Without a notifications webhook, system: Without a notifications webhook, system alerts cannot be sent to external services (e.g., Slack).
Without a search engine (vector DB), kno: Without a search engine (vector DB), knowledge base search, RAG, and semantic search are unavailable.
Without a valid license, license-protect: Without a valid license, license-protected features—knowledge base, DbSphere, agent flows, guardrails, tracing, and evaluation—are all blocked.
Without an LLM connection, chat, agents,: Without an LLM connection, chat, agents, and all AI responses are unavailable.
Without an embedding engine, knowledge b: Without an embedding engine, knowledge base (RAG) document embedding and search do not work.
Without speech configured, voice input (: Without speech configured, voice input (STT) and voice output (TTS) are unavailable in chat.
Without the code gateway, the LLM proxy: Without the code gateway, the LLM proxy and usage management for AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) are unavailable. Requires an Enterprise license.
which column maps to term / synonyms / d: which column maps to term / synonyms / description / category, and how to combine multiple columns (e.g., country code + city code → UN/LOCODE).
Workers report progress back via callbac: Workers report progress back via callback API

Your company domain terms. Mistakes dire: Glossary is the ground truth for your domain. Follow the [Standard template] on the right so AI uses it accurately.
Your entire contribution will go directl: Your entire contribution will go directly to the plugin developer. However, the chosen funding platform might have its own fees.
Your group does not have permission for: Your group does not have permission for this feature. Ask your admin.
Your Google account is missing the requi: Your Google account is missing the required permissions. Reconnect it in Settings → Connections.

Creator: Creator
\"Unused\" means never retrieved into a: "Unused" means never retrieved into a prompt — not LLM-verified as useless. Recently added few-shots may simply have had no matching question yet. Review before deleting.
Only SQL Few-shots are listed; DDL/Docum: Only SQL Few-shots are listed; DDL/Documentation are auto-referenced.
Reference logging needs about {{days}} d: Reference logging needs about {{days}} days of data before this is reliable.
No unused few-shots to clean up: No unused few-shots to clean up
Delete {{count}} selected few-shots? Thi: Delete {{count}} selected few-shots? This cannot be undone.
Deep summary uses the full document (map: Deep summary uses the full document (map-reduce), not just top chunks.
Improves recognition of dense tables and: Improves recognition of dense tables and small fonts (e.g. datasheets/drawings). Slower and higher cost.
The current settings will be saved as a: The current settings will be saved as a new version, then replaced with v{{n}}. Sharing permissions are kept as-is.
